testcase.name: TC-SHORTS | Vertical Video Player › TC-SHORTS-07: Given I am on the page, When the page renders, Then short video autoplays or a play button is visible
TC-THEME: Theme Switching › TC-THEME-06: Given the page is loaded, When I click toggle twice returns to the original theme, Then it responds correctly
TC-THEME: Keyboard Accessibility › TC-THEME-11: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then pressing Enter on focused toggle changes the theme
Page Load and Profile Header › TC-PROFILE-05: Given I am authenticated and on the page, When I perform the action, Then bio or about text is shown if set
